Records.description: Paramecium family, paramecium_L5_massless-internal-offshell-external. Nonplanar Calabi-Yau bestiary graph at odd loop order L, with 2(L+1) MASSLESS propagators (arXiv:1810.07689). X-cell ladder body with an apex at BOTH ends; degree-keyed decoration: 2 off-shell legs (the apexes) + 4 massless legs (the end rail columns); 6 effective legs at every L (figure-pinned). Marginal in D=4 and saturates the maximal rigidity 2(L-1) (checked through 11 loops). The odd-L companion to the tardigrade; L=1 degenerates to the four-mass box, nontrivial members start at L=3.
